name: Diff Review
description: Code-review visual language with clear additions, removals, and annotation callouts.

preview.sampleText: Focused readability for changelogs, review notes, and technical deltas.

classes.h5: text-base font-semibold mt-4 mb-2 text-slate-300 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mt-3 mb-2 text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.th: border border-slate-700 p-2 bg-slate-800 text-left font-semibold text-slate-100
classes.blockquote: my-4 rounded-r border-l-4 border-yellow-400 bg-yellow-950/30 py-2 pl-4 italic text-yellow-100
classes.code: rounded bg-slate-800 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-emerald-300
classes.pre: my-4 rounded border border-slate-700 bg-[#0b1220] p-4 text-slate-100 overflow-x-auto
